summary: Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Prompt for Jump to Live
description:
GIVEN the user is playing back Live content behind the live point
AND the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the "Jump to Live" option
steps.result: THEN the user will hear:  “Jump to Live, x out of y options. Press Select to jump to live in this game, Press <appropriate_directions> for more quick actions options, Press down for player controls, Press back to dismiss controls.”
